name: PEOPLES BANCORP OF NORTH CAROLINA INC
summary: Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina, Inc. is a bank holding company formed in 1999, owning Peoples Bank, a state-chartered commercial bank founded in 1912. The Bank operates 15 banking offices and loan production offices in North Carolina, offering commercial and real estate loans, deposit products, investment services through Raymond James Financial Services, real estate appraisal, and brokerage services to individuals and small-to-medium businesses in the Catawba Valley region.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Loans to businesses across various industries with no single industry concentration.

products.name: Real Estate Loans
products.description: Predominantly variable and fixed rate commercial property loans including residential development loans.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Core deposit products for individuals and small-to-medium businesses in the Banks market area.

products.name: Investment Services
products.description: Access to stocks, bonds, mutual funds, annuities, and brokerage services through Raymond James Financial Services.

products.name: Real Estate Appraisal and Brokerage
products.description: Real estate appraisal and brokerage services provided through Real Estate Advisory Services, Inc.

products.name: Appraisal Clearinghouse (CBRES)
products.description: Clearing-house for appraisal services enabling community banks to find and engage appraisal companies independently.

partnerships.description: Provides investment counseling and non-deposit investment products to Bank customers through Peoples Investment Services, Inc.
